column4: Description
A crimson scout that starts every run ready to patch you back up.
An ember-hot familiar that restores health in quick surges once unlocked.
A grim escort that keeps your hearts stitched together under pressure.
A smoldering guard that maintains a steady healing trickle through the wave.
A calm support spirit that keeps recovery stable while you kite.
A bright-wing partner that tops you off whenever the run gets messy.
A spectral mimic that mirrors your pacing and keeps the sustain coming.
A compact firebrand that stays close and radiates quick recovery.
A sharp little hunter that keeps you alive while the swarm collapses in.
A cool-headed sniper spirit that favors steadier, longer sustain.
A cursed familiar that trades comfort for stronger restorative bursts.
A patient vine spirit that keeps your health bar from falling apart.
A chaotic gremlin that somehow keeps your healing cadence on rhythm.
A moonlit guardian that smooths out incoming pressure with quiet heals.
A quiet medic spirit built entirely around keeping the hero standing.
A starburst familiar that flares brighter as the fight gets dangerous.
A night watcher that steadies you before the next hit can land.
A stone sentinel that heals slower but carries more raw recovery.
A bright arcade drone that sprinkles fast little restorations everywhere.
A black-feather scout that covers your blind side with constant support.
A composed tactician that converts good positioning into reliable healing.
A quick silver escort that smooths out every rough patch in the wave.
A volatile striker that turns panic moments into heavier recovery spikes.
A wicked little hunter that stays tight and keeps the last hearts alive.
